items.title: Module / package / script
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB S["script.py
(run top-to-bottom, one-off)"] M["module.py
(importable file, single namespace)"] P["package/
__init__.py
+ many modules"] S -. one-off .-> Use1["used directly"] M -. composable .-> Use2["imported by many callers"] P -. composable .-> Use3["imported as a tree"]
items.caption: Scripts are run; modules and packages are imported. Reusable code lives in modules/packages, not scripts.

items.title: Public vs internal boundary
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR Caller["Caller code"] --> Public["Public API
(listed in __all__)"] Public --> Internal["Internal helpers
(prefixed _, not in __all__)"] style Public fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#16a34a style Internal fill:#fee2e2,stroke:#dc2626
items.caption: Public API is the contract; internals are free to change. `__all__` and `_` prefix mark the boundary.
